hero.title: Professional Precision Mold Manufacturing & Specialty Plastics Processing
hero.subtitle: Shanghai Kuixing Electronics Technology Co., Ltd. specializes in custom processing of high-performance specialty plastics including PEEK, PEI, PPSU, providing one-stop solutions for medical devices, automotive parts, and electronics industries.

about.pageTitle: Shanghai Kuixing Electronics Technology Co., Ltd.
about.pageSubtitle: Located in Baoshan District, Shanghai, specializing in precision mold design and manufacturing, injection molding, painting, printing, pad printing, hot stamping, assembly and other integrated services. Focused on custom processing of high-performance specialty plastic products, widely used in analytical instruments, medical devices, automotive parts, sensors, smart home and other fields.
about.purposeContent: Everyone for Quality, Process Control, Stable Quality, Customer Satisfaction
about.goalContent: Continuously improve competitiveness, cohesion and innovation to create greater value for customers and society
about.equipmentSubtitle: The company has advanced production and testing equipment to ensure product accuracy and quality.
about.moldDeptContent: CNC machining centers, Sodick EDM machines, grinders, drilling machines, 20+ units
about.injectionDeptContent: 31 injection machines (50T-800T, including two-color, vertical, thin-wall high-speed)
about.paintDeptContent: Class 100,000 clean spray booth, automatic painting and UV assembly line
about.assemblyShopContent: Silk screen, pad printing, hot stamping, ultrasonic welding equipment
about.testEquipmentContent: Coordinate measuring machine, 2D image measuring instrument, colorimeter, friction tester, etc.
about.medicalShopContent: Class 100,000 clean medical parts injection workshop, meeting high-end medical product requirements

about.commitmentContent: We will continue to uphold the spirit of 'Professional, Integrity, Pioneering, Innovation', continuously optimize technology and management, and work hand in hand with global customers to create win-win outcomes with high-quality products and excellent service.

pricing.specialtyMaterialsSubtitle: We specialize in processing and application of high-performance specialty plastics

PEEK.description: Polyetheretherketone, excellent heat resistance, high strength, chemical stability

PEI.description: Polyetherimide, maintains excellent mechanical properties at high temperatures

PPSU.description: Polyphenylsulfone, transparent, heat resistant, good biocompatibility

PPS.description: Polyphenylene sulfide, chemical corrosion resistant, good dimensional stability

PFA.description: Perfluoroalkoxy resin, superior chemical corrosion resistance

pricing.pricingExplanationSubtitle: Prices vary based on product complexity, material requirements, quantity, and other factors
pricing.materialSelectionContent: Specialty materials like PEEK, PEI have higher costs; standard engineering plastics are relatively lower
pricing.productComplexityContent: Products with complex structures and high precision requirements have higher processing difficulty and prices
pricing.productionQuantityContent: Mass production reduces unit costs; larger quantities mean better prices
pricing.qualityRequirementsContent: Medical-grade, automotive-grade and other high standards require stricter process control
pricing.technicalAdvantageContent: Advanced processing equipment and professional technical team ensure product quality
pricing.costControlContent: Scale production and supply chain optimization provide competitive pricing
pricing.serviceGuaranteeContent: One-stop service from design to delivery reduces customer communication costs
pricing.qualityCommitmentContent: Strict quality management system ensures product stability and reliability
pricing.getQuoteSubtitle: Contact our professional team for personalized solutions and accurate quotes
